creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
While at it: note that "gantt" in COMMENT should be "Gantt".
It also seems that the original tarball has disappeared from the
original site and only FreeBSD mirrors carry it ! Maybe we should add it
to LOCAL_SITE? 
FWIW, I also think that NASA now sells this, or an updated version as
part of COSMIC.
